name: ScIdsMadorGrpLoad

text.value: WITH cte_stg AS (SELECT GRP_MA_DOR_SK, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.tmp_ScIdsMadorGrpLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR AS T USING cte_stg AS S ON T.GRP_MA_DOR_SK = S.GRP_MA_DOR_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.GRP_ID = S.GRP_ID, T.TAX_YR = S.TAX_YR, T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.AS_OF_DTM = S.AS_OF_DTM, T.GRP_SK = S.GRP_SK, T.GRP_NM = S.GRP_NM, T.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM = S.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, T.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT = S.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, T.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM = S.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_1 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_2 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_3 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, T.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM = S.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, T.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK = S.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, T.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 = S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, T.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (GRP_MA_DOR_SK, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4) VALUES (S.GRP_MA_DOR_SK, S.GRP_ID, S.TAX_YR, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.AS_OF_DTM, S.GRP_SK, S.GRP_NM, S.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, S.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, S.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, S.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, S.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4); MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR_HIST AS T USING (SELECT GRP_MA_DOR_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm} AS AS_OF_DTM, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 FROM cte_stg) AS S ON T.GRP_MA_DOR_SK = S.GRP_MA_DOR_SK AND T.AS_OF_DTM = S.AS_OF_DTM WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.GRP_ID = S.GRP_ID, T.TAX_YR = S.TAX_YR, T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.GRP_SK = S.GRP_SK, T.GRP_NM = S.GRP_NM, T.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM = S.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, T.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT = S.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, T.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM = S.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_1 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_2 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, T.GRP_ADDR_LN_3 = S.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, T.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM = S.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, T.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK = S.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, T.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 = S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, T.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (GRP_MA_DOR_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4) VALUES (S.GRP_MA_DOR_SK, S.AS_OF_DTM, S.GRP_ID, S.TAX_YR, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.GRP_SK, S.GRP_NM, S.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, S.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, S.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, S.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, S.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, S.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, S.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4);
